sect1.title: 29. People of Puerto Rican Heritage
sect1.para: © The Author(s), under exclusive license to Springer Nature Switzerland AG 2024
E. A. Fenkl, L. D. Purnell (eds.)
Nicole Wertheim College of Nursing and Health Sciences, Florida International University, Miami, FL, USA

Dominant language and dialects, Temporal relationships, Format for names, Death rituals, Spirituality, Machismo and marianismo, Biocultural ecology, Diseases and health conditions, Nutrition and food rituals, Traditional health practices, Folk practitioners
